tutorial.speaker: System
tutorial.text: Press Enter to investigate or talk.

tutorial.speaker: System
tutorial.text: Press Esc to open the menu.

tutorial.speaker: System
tutorial.text: Talk to Lumi first. She may know something.

lumi_intro.speaker: Lumi
lumi_intro.text: Near the upper-right ruins... something is glowing.

orion_first_seen.speaker: Lyra
orion_first_seen.text: That shape... is that a person?
